ticket.title: FIX DATA SANITIZATION ISSUES IN QUICKBOOKS BATCH USER SYNC

test_cases.description: Verify total user count in LakbayHub matches QuickBooks after full batch sync.
test_cases.expected_result: User counts match exactly; no records missing or duplicated.

test_cases.description: Verify legitimate special/accented characters in user fields are preserved, not stripped by sanitization.
test_cases.expected_result: Valid special/safe characters preserved; only unsafe/invalid data stripped.

test_cases.description: Verify malicious/invalid input (script injection, invalid encoding) is properly sanitized without breaking sync.
test_cases.expected_result: Unsafe content sanitized/escaped; sync does not fail or silently drop record.
test_cases.actual_result: Unsafe input handled without sync failure.

test_cases.description: Verify re-running batch sync does not create duplicate entries for already-synced users.
test_cases.expected_result: No duplicate record created; existing record recognized and skipped or updated in place.

test_cases.description: Verify users added close to/during a sync cycle are not skipped or lost due to timing issues.
test_cases.expected_result: User captured in current or next sync cycle, not permanently dropped.
test_cases.actual_result: User captured in current/next cycle as expected.

test_cases.description: Verify user records with empty/null optional fields sync without errors or record loss.
test_cases.expected_result: Record syncs successfully; blank fields remain blank/null, no failure.

test_cases.description: Verify sanitization does not alter meaning/format of valid edge-case data (leading zeros, long names, etc).
test_cases.expected_result: Values transferred with meaning intact; only unsafe characters removed.

test_cases.description: Verify field-level and record-level consistency between LakbayHub and QuickBooks after sync across a sample set.
test_cases.expected_result: All fields match as expected; no unexplained discrepancies.

test_cases.description: Verify a deliberately problematic record fails sync gracefully with clear logging, without blocking the rest of the batch.
test_cases.expected_result: Problematic record flagged/logged with clear reason; other valid records still sync successfully.
test_cases.actual_result: Problematic record logged; other records unaffected.
